segments.source_content:
---
title: Docusaurus 3.6
authors: [slorber]
tags: [release]
image: ./img/social-card.png
date: 2024-11-04
---

translations.zh-CN: @@untranslatable_placeholder_58cfcc64

segments.source_content: We are happy to announce **Docusaurus 3.6**.

translations.zh-CN: 我们很高兴地宣布 **Docusaurus 3.6** 正式发布。

segments.source_content: Docusaurus is now ⚡️⚡️⚡️ **much faster** to build your site.

translations.zh-CN: Docusaurus 现在能以 ⚡️⚡️⚡️ **更快的速度** 构建您的站点。

segments.source_content: Upgrading should be easy. Our [release process](/community/release-process) respects [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/). Minor versions do not include any breaking changes.

translations.zh-CN: 升级过程应该很轻松。我们的[发布流程](/community/release-process)遵循[语义化版本规范](https://semver.org/)。次要版本不包含任何破坏性变更。

segments.source_content: ![Docusaurus blog post social card](./img/social-card.png)

translations.zh-CN: ![Docusaurus 博客文章社交媒体卡片](./img/social-card.png)

segments.source_content: ## Highlights

translations.zh-CN: ## 核心亮点

segments.source_content: This release has been mostly focused on build performance through the [Docusaurus Faster](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/issues/10556) project.

translations.zh-CN: 本次版本更新主要聚焦于通过 [Docusaurus Faster](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/issues/10556) 项目提升构建性能。

segments.source_content: ## Docusaurus Faster

translations.zh-CN: ## Docusaurus Faster 计划

segments.source_content: The [Docusaurus Faster](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/issues/10556) project's goal is to reduce the build times and memory consumption.

translations.zh-CN: [Docusaurus Faster](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/issues/10556) 项目的目标是缩短构建时间并降低内存消耗。

segments.source_content: We have worked on multiple optimizations and modernized our infrastructure to use faster Rust-based tools, notably:

translations.zh-CN: 我们实施了多项优化，并将基础设施升级为更快的基于 Rust 的工具链，主要包括：

segments.source_content:
- 🦀 [Rspack](https://rspack.dev/): Fast Rust-based web bundler, almost drop-in replacement for [webpack](https://webpack.js.org/)
- 🦀 [SWC](https://swc.rs/): Speedy Web Compiler, Rust-based platform for the Web (HTML, CSS, JS)
- 🦀 [Lightning CSS](https://lightningcss.dev/): An extremely fast CSS parser, transformer, bundler, and minifier

translations.zh-CN:
- 🦀 [Rspack](https://rspack.dev/)：基于 Rust 的快速 Web 打包工具，近乎可无缝替代 [webpack](https://webpack.js.org/)
- 🦀 [SWC](https://swc.rs/)：极速 Web 编译器，基于 Rust 的 Web 开发平台（支持 HTML、CSS、JS）
- 🦀 [Lightning CSS](https://lightningcss.dev/)：超高速 CSS 解析器、转换器、打包工具和压缩器

segments.source_content: ### Impacts

translations.zh-CN: ### 影响范围

segments.source_content: Adopting a new infrastructure can have various impacts. It's impossible to list them all exhaustively, so let's focus on the major ones.

translations.zh-CN: 采用新基础设施可能产生多方面影响。我们无法穷尽所有细节，以下聚焦主要变化。

segments.source_content: To help you adopt it easily, we have been fairly conservative in terms of expected static site output and [browser support](/docs/browser-support).

translations.zh-CN: 为便于您顺利过渡，我们在静态站点输出和[浏览器支持](/docs/browser-support)方面保持了高度兼容性。

segments.source_content: #### Build Time

translations.zh-CN: #### 构建时间

segments.source_content: Benchmarks on community site show that you can expect your production site to build ⚡️**2 to 4 times faster**! 🔥:

translations.zh-CN: 社区站点基准测试显示，生产环境构建速度可提升 ⚡️**2 至 4 倍**！🔥：

segments.source_content:
- [React Native website](https://github.com/facebook/react-native-website/pull/4268): 3.04x faster 🔥
- [Babel website](https://github.com/babel/website/pull/2997): 3.27x faster 🔥
- [Lexical website](https://github.com/facebook/lexical/pull/6761): 2x faster 🔥

translations.zh-CN:
- [React Native 官网](https://github.com/facebook/react-native-website/pull/4268)：提速 3.04 倍 🔥
- [Babel 官网](https://github.com/babel/website/pull/2997)：提速 3.27 倍 🔥
- [Lexical 官网](https://github.com/facebook/lexical/pull/6761)：提速 2 倍 🔥

segments.source_content: [How to benchmark](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/issues/10556#issuecomment-2407671873)

translations.zh-CN: [如何进行基准测试](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/issues/10556#issuecomment-2407671873)

segments.source_content:
:::note[About rebuilds]

[Rspack doesn't support persistent caching yet](https://rspack.dev/misc/planning/roadmap#persistent-cache), but it's on the roadmap and should be implemented soon. We think it's not a problem for the adoption of Rspack considering a cold Rspack build is usually as fast as a warm Webpack build using persistent caching.

:::

translations.zh-CN:
:::note[关于增量构建]

[Rspack 暂未支持持久化缓存](https://rspack.dev/misc/planning/roadmap#persistent-cache)，但已列入路线图并将很快实现。我们认为这不会影响 Rspack 的采用，因为 Rspack 的冷启动构建速度通常与启用持久化缓存的 Webpack 热构建相当。

:::

segments.source_content: #### Memory Consumption

translations.zh-CN: #### 内存消耗

segments.source_content: You should also notice an improvement in memory consumption:

translations.zh-CN: 您还将观察到内存占用的改善：

segments.source_content:
- The new infrastructure consumes less memory overall
- We fixed an important [memory leak](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10599) that affects in particular i18n sites
- We added [CI checks](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10601) to ensure that we don't regress, and that our site and init template can both build in a memory-constrained environments
- We added [internal tooling](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10590) to better understand which step of a build consumes memory
- We [removed a `process.exit(0)`](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10410) that can hide memory leaks in your own code and third-party plugins

translations.zh-CN:
- 新基础设施整体内存消耗更低
- 我们修复了主要影响国际化站点的严重[内存泄漏问题](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10599)
- 新增了[CI 检查](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10601)确保内存占用不退化，且站点和初始化模板都能在内存受限环境中构建
- 增加了[内部工具](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10590)用于分析构建过程中各阶段的内存消耗
- 移除了可能掩盖自有代码和第三方插件内存泄漏的 [`process.exit(0)`](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10410) 调用

segments.source_content: #### Other Impacts

translations.zh-CN: #### 其他影响

segments.source_content:
- The HTML minifier now [emits warnings in case of invalid HTML markup](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/discussions/10580)
- The static HTML output is [~5% smaller](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10554)
- Some bugs are automatically fixed by the new infrastructure

translations.zh-CN:
- HTML 压缩工具现在会[在遇到无效 HTML 标记时发出警告](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/discussions/10580)
- 静态 HTML 输出体积[缩小约 5%](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10554)
- 部分错误会被新基础设施自动修复

segments.source_content: ### Adoption Strategy

translations.zh-CN: ### 采用策略

segments.source_content: This new infrastructure is a breaking change, but it is opt-in and does not require a new major version of Docusaurus.

translations.zh-CN: 这套新基础设施属于破坏性变更，但采用是可选功能，无需升级 Docusaurus 主版本号。

segments.source_content: Before using Docusaurus Faster, add this new package:

translations.zh-CN: 在使用 Docusaurus Faster 前，请先添加这个新包：

segments.source_content:
```bash npm2yarn
npm install @docusaurus/faster
```

translations.zh-CN: @@untranslatable_placeholder_c808e01e

segments.source_content: To help you **adopt it incrementally under Docusaurus v3**, we're introducing a set of feature flags that you can activate progressively.

translations.zh-CN: 为帮助您**在 Docusaurus v3 下逐步采用**，我们引入了一组可渐进式启用的功能开关。

segments.source_content: We recommend turning them on all at once with this simple boolean shortcut:

translations.zh-CN: 推荐使用以下布尔值快捷方式一次性开启所有功能：
@@untranslatable_placeholder_65400624

segments.source_content: In case one of the flags does not work for your site, it's possible to turn feature flags on independently:

translations.zh-CN: 若某个功能开关不适用于您的站点，也可独立启用各开关：
@@untranslatable_placeholder_59f28e14

segments.source_content:
- [`swcJsLoader`](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10435): Use [SWC](https://swc.rs/) to transpile JS (instead of [Babel](https://babeljs.io/))
- [`swcJsMinimizer`](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10441): Use [SWC](https://swc.rs/) to minify JS (instead of [Terser](https://github.com/terser/terser))
- [`swcHtmlMinimizer `](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10554): Use [SWC](https://swc.rs/) to minify HTML and inlined JS/CSS (instead of [html-minifier-terser](https://github.com/terser/html-minifier-terser))
- [`lightningCssMinimizer`](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10522): Use [Lightning CSS](https://lightningcss.dev/) to minify CSS (instead of [cssnano](https://github.com/cssnano/cssnano) and [clean-css](https://github.com/clean-css/clean-css))
- [`rspackBundler`](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10402): Use [Rspack](https://rspack.dev/) to bundle your app (instead of [webpack](https://webpack.js.org/))
- [`mdxCrossCompilerCache`](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10479): Compile MDX files once for both browser/Node.js environments instead of twice

translations.zh-CN:
- [`swcJsLoader`](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10435)：使用 [SWC](https://swc.rs/) 转译 JS（替代 [Babel](https://babeljs.io/)）
- [`swcJsMinimizer`](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10441)：使用 [SWC](https://swc.rs/) 压缩 JS（替代 [Terser](https://github.com/terser/terser)）
- [`swcHtmlMinimizer`](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10554)：使用 [SWC](https://swc.rs/) 压缩 HTML 及内联 JS/CSS（替代 [html-minifier-terser](https://github.com/terser/html-minifier-terser)）
- [`lightningCssMinimizer`](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10522)：使用 [Lightning CSS](https://lightningcss.dev/) 压缩 CSS（替代 [cssnano](https://github.com/cssnano/cssnano) 和 [clean-css](https://github.com/clean-css/clean-css)）
- [`rspackBundler`](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10402)：使用 [Rspack](https://rspack.dev/) 打包应用（替代 [webpack](https://webpack.js.org/)）
- [`mdxCrossCompilerCache`](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10479)：MDX 文件只需编译一次即可同时用于浏览器/Node.js 环境

segments.source_content:
:::tip[Experimental but safe]

Don't be afraid to turn this feature on. What's experimental is the config options.

The new infrastructure is robust and well-tested by our CI pipeline. The [Docusaurus site](https://docusaurus.io/) already uses it in production, and we plan to use it on other Meta docs sites as well.

:::

translations.zh-CN:
:::tip[实验性但安全]

无需担心启用此功能。实验性质仅针对配置选项。

新基础设施经过 CI 管道充分测试，具有鲁棒性。[Docusaurus 官网](https://docusaurus.io/)已在生产环境使用，我们也计划将其推广至 Meta 其他文档站点。

:::

segments.source_content: #### Plugins

translations.zh-CN: #### 插件兼容性

segments.source_content: The new infrastructure uses [Rspack](https://rspack.dev/). By chance, Rspack is almost 100% compatible with [webpack](https://webpack.js.org/), and Rspack shouldn't break our plugin ecosystem.

translations.zh-CN: 新基础设施采用 [Rspack](https://rspack.dev/)。巧合的是，Rspack 与 [webpack](https://webpack.js.org/) 几乎 100% 兼容，不会破坏现有插件生态。

segments.source_content: Most Docusaurus plugins should work out of the box with Rspack, even those implementing [`configureWebpack`](/docs/api/plugin-methods/lifecycle-apis#configureWebpack).

translations.zh-CN: 多数 Docusaurus 插件应能直接在 Rspack 下运行，包括那些实现了 [`configureWebpack`](/docs/api/plugin-methods/lifecycle-apis#configureWebpack) 的插件。

segments.source_content: However, some of them will require small modifications to make them compatible with Rspack. The general idea is to avoid importing `webpack` directly, and use the "dynamically provided" webpack instance instead:

translations.zh-CN: 但部分插件需微调以适配 Rspack。核心原则是避免直接导入 `webpack`，转而使用"动态提供"的 webpack 实例：
@@untranslatable_placeholder_18fb666f

segments.source_content:
:::tip[For plugins authors]

Check the [dedicated issue](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/issues/10572) for guidelines and support.

:::

translations.zh-CN:
:::tip[致插件开发者]

参阅[专项议题](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/issues/10572)获取指南与支持。

:::

segments.source_content: ### Next Steps

translations.zh-CN: ### 后续计划

segments.source_content: It's only the beginning: we will continue working on the [Docusaurus Faster](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/issues/10556) project and already have a few more performance improvements planned.

translations.zh-CN: 这只是开始：我们将持续推进 [Docusaurus Faster](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/issues/10556) 项目，已有更多性能优化方案正在规划中。

segments.source_content: Depending on [your feedback](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/issues/10556), we plan to make this new infrastructure the default in an upcoming major version of Docusaurus.

translations.zh-CN: 根据[用户反馈](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/issues/10556)，我们计划在Docusaurus的下一主要版本中将此新基础设施设为默认配置。

segments.source_content: 🙏 We'd like to thank the authors of all these great tools that already helped us make Docusaurus much faster than before. In particular the [Rspack team](https://rspack.dev/misc/team/core-team) that supported us along the way, handled our feedback very quickly and implemented all the missing features we needed to make it happen. 👏

translations.zh-CN: 🙏 我们要特别感谢这些优秀工具的开发者们，他们帮助Docusaurus实现了显著的性能提升。尤其要感谢[Rspack团队](https://rspack.dev/misc/team/core-team)在整个过程中给予的支持，快速响应我们的反馈，并实现了所有必需功能使其成为可能。👏

segments.source_content: ## Rsdoctor plugin

translations.zh-CN: ## Rsdoctor插件

segments.source_content: In [#10588](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10588), we created a Docusaurus plugin for [Rsdoctor](https://rsdoctor.dev/). It analyzes the bundling phase of Docusaurus and helps you figure out what slows down the bundler in terms of loaders, plugins and minimizers. It works for both webpack and Rspack.

translations.zh-CN: 在[#10588](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10588)中，我们为[Rsdoctor](https://rsdoctor.dev/)创建了Docusaurus插件。该插件能分析Docusaurus的打包阶段，帮助您定位影响打包速度的加载器、插件和压缩器问题，同时支持webpack和Rspack。

segments.source_content: ![Loader timeline example](./img/rsdoctor.jpg)

translations.zh-CN: ![加载器时间轴示例](./img/rsdoctor.jpg)

segments.source_content: To use it, install the new [`@docusaurus/plugin-rsdoctor`](/docs/api/plugins/@docusaurus/plugin-rsdoctor) package, and then use the plugin in your config:

translations.zh-CN: 使用前请先安装[`@docusaurus/plugin-rsdoctor`](/docs/api/plugins/@docusaurus/plugin-rsdoctor)包，然后在配置中添加插件：
@@untranslatable_placeholder_a1af15b5

segments.source_content: ## Mermaid

translations.zh-CN: ## Mermaid图表

segments.source_content: In [#10510](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10510), we relaxed our [Mermaid diagrams](https://mermaid.js.org/) dependency range to allow newer major versions of Mermaid. We now support both Mermaid 10/11, and expect upcoming versions to be compatible, letting you upgrade on your own terms.

translations.zh-CN: 在[#10510](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10510)中，我们放宽了对[Mermaid图表](https://mermaid.js.org/)的版本限制，现已支持Mermaid 10/11及后续主要版本，您可自主决定升级时机。

segments.source_content: This unlocks new types of diagrams, such as [Architecture Diagrams](https://mermaid.js.org/syntax/architecture):

translations.zh-CN: 现在可以创建新型图表，例如[架构图](https://mermaid.js.org/syntax/architecture)：

segments.source_content:
```mermaid
architecture-beta
    group api(cloud)[API]

    service db(database)[Database] in api
    service disk1(disk)[Storage] in api
    service disk2(disk)[Storage] in api
    service server(server)[Server] in api

    db:L -- R:server
    disk1:T -- B:server
    disk2:T -- B:db
```

translations.zh-CN: @@untranslatable_placeholder_eff3427d

segments.source_content: ## Translations

translations.zh-CN: ## 翻译更新

segments.source_content:
- 🇸🇮 [#10551](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10551): Improve Slovenian theme translations.
- 🇻🇳 [#10507](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10507): Improve Vietnamese theme translations.
- 🇪🇸 [#10413](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10413): Improve Spanish theme translations.

translations.zh-CN:
- 🇸🇮 [#10551](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10551)：优化斯洛文尼亚语主题翻译
- 🇻🇳 [#10507](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10507)：优化越南语主题翻译
- 🇪🇸 [#10413](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10413)：优化西班牙语主题翻译

segments.source_content: ## Other changes

translations.zh-CN: ## 其他变更

segments.source_content: Other notable changes include:

translations.zh-CN: 其他重要更新包括：

segments.source_content:
- [#10586](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10586): Blog support for `frontMatter.title_meta` to override `frontMatter.title` for SEO reason.
- [#10600](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10600): `docusaurus build` and `docusaurus deploy` now support multiple `--locale` CLI args.
- [#10454](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10454): `docusaurus-remark-plugin-npm2yarn` upgrades to [`npm-to-yarn` v3](https://github.com/nebrelbug/npm-to-yarn/releases/tag/v3.0.0) and can convert `npx` commands.
- [#10612](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10612): Canary releases will use `3.5.2-canary-<number>` instead of `0.0.0-canary-<number>` to respect plugins `peerDependency` constraints.
- [#10547](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10547): `@docusaurus/tsconfig` upgrades to `target: 'es2022'`.
- [#10514](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10514): Remove `babel.config.js` from Docusaurus init templates to discourage customizing Babel.

translations.zh-CN:
- [#10586](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10586)：博客支持通过`frontMatter.title_meta`覆盖SEO标题
- [#10600](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10600)：`docusaurus build`和`docusaurus deploy`命令现支持多`--locale`参数
- [#10454](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10454)：`docusaurus-remark-plugin-npm2yarn`升级至[`npm-to-yarn` v3](https://github.com/nebrelbug/npm-to-yarn/releases/tag/v3.0.0)，支持转换`npx`命令
- [#10612](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10612)：Canary版本号格式改为`3.5.2-canary-<number>`以符合插件`peerDependency`要求
- [#10547](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10547)：`@docusaurus/tsconfig`升级至`target: 'es2022'`
- [#10514](https://github.com/facebook/docusaurus/pull/10514)：移除了初始化模板中的`babel.config.js`以降低Babel定制需求

segments.source_content: Check the **[3.6.0 changelog entry](/changelog/3.6.0)** for an exhaustive list of changes.

translations.zh-CN: 查看 **[3.6.0 版本更新日志](/changelog/3.6.0)** 获取完整的变更列表。
